headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Regency Centers, Raises Price Target to $90
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Cooper Clark   maintains Regency Centers (NASDAQ:REG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $88 to $90.

raw.headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Regency Centers, Raises Price Target to $90
raw.summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Cooper Clark   maintains Regency Centers (NASDAQ:REG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $88 to $90.

headline: Regency Centers Corp (NASDAQ:REG) Shows Technical Strength and Breakout Setup
summary: Regency Centers (REG) shows strong breakout potential with an 8/10 Technical Rating and 9/10 Setup Rating, supported by a solid uptrend and consolidation near highs.
